address: Bristol Square and Golden Gate Apartments
description: Welcome to the luxurious Bristol Square and Golden Gate Apartments located in the heart of Wixom, Michigan. These apartments are thoughtfully designed to meet your needs and provide a comfortable living experience. With a range of newly upgraded one and two-bedroom floor plans, these apartments offer modern features and amenities suitable for every household, including pets. The community at Bristol Square and Golden Gate Apartments offers a wide range of amenities to ensure that you have the best living experience. Enjoy the sparkling swimming pool and expansive sundeck with a pergola, where you can relax and soak up the sun. The community also provides laundry facilities in each building, AT&T TV, and the convenience of The Hub by Amazon package lockers. Bristol Square and Golden Gate Apartments also provide a pet-friendly environment that welcomes pets, so you can bring your furry friends along. These apartments are located within walking distance of Downtown Wixom, where you can enjoy an array of dining and shopping options. The apartments are also conveniently situated near major highways such as I-96, I-696, and I-275, making it easier to access surrounding areas. Walled Lake Consolidated Schools, one of the top-rated schools in the state, is also nearby, ensuring that your children receive the best education possible. Additionally, Kensington Metro Park and South Lyon Dog Park are just a short drive away, offering you and your pets an opportunity to enjoy nature and outdoor activities. The apartment amenities at Bristol Square and Golden Gate Apartments are exceptional, and you can expect to find all the features that you need to live comfortably. The apartments feature fully-equipped kitchens with contemporary white shaker-style cabinetry, soft white quartz countertops, and stainless steel under-mount kitchen sinks. The kitchens also include black Frigidaire appliances such as a freestanding gas range, dishwasher, and overhead microwave, and a Delta Peerles Show more
